name: Dave Tipp Jewelry & Loan
description_short: Dave Tipp Jewelry & Loan is a pawn shop in Downtown Los Angeles offering collateral-based loans against jewelry, gold, and other valuables with quick funding.
description_long: Dave Tipp Jewelry & Loan operates as part of LA Pawn Shops, a network of four pawn shop locations across Los Angeles County. The Downtown Los Angeles location at 561 S Broadway has been serving the community as a traditional pawn operation. As a pawn shop, Dave Tipp Jewelry & Loan provides collateral-based lending where customers can receive cash loans by pledging personal items—primarily jewelry and gold—as security. This model differs from unsecured personal loans, as the lender retains the pledged item until the loan is repaid with interest. The company is regulated under California law, as evidenced by their disclosure of California Notice of Charges CFC 21003, indicating compliance with state pawn shop regulations. Dave Tipp operates within a larger corporate structure that also includes Covina Jewelry & Loan, Sunset Jewelry & Loan, and Tucker's Pawn Shop, suggesting operational consistency and established business practices across multiple locations. The website provides location information and a central phone line (213-892-8188) for customer inquiries, though specific details about loan terms, interest rates, redemption periods, and fees are not disclosed on the publicly available pages. The simplicity of the online presence suggests this is a traditional brick-and-mortar pawn operation without extensive digital marketing or online loan application capabilities. Like all pawn shops, Dave Tipp operates on the principle of immediate liquidity for customers in exchange for surrendering ownership rights to collateral if loans are not repaid within the statutory redemption period—typically 120 days in California.
pros: Multiple convenient LA County locations including Downtown Los Angeles, Covina, West Covina, and East Los Angeles
Immediate cash funding available (typical for pawn shops, no credit check required)
Regulated pawn shop compliant with California pawn law and CFC 21003 disclosure requirements
Established business with multiple branded locations suggesting operational stability
Direct phone support available at 213-892-8188 for customer inquiries
Accepts jewelry and gold as collateral, providing access to liquid capital without selling items outright
cons: No specific loan terms, interest rates, or fees disclosed on website—customers must visit in person or call for pricing
Limited online functionality; location pages return 404 errors, suggesting outdated or incomplete website
Collateral is forfeited if loan is not repaid within California's 120-day redemption period—customer loses ownership of pledged items
Pawn loans carry interest costs that accumulate quickly; total repayment amount significantly exceeds principal borrowed
No evidence of online application, rate quotes, or transparent fee schedules available before visiting location
best_for: Customers who own jewelry or gold and need immediate cash without credit checks or lengthy approval processes
Short-term borrowers who can repay within 120 days and prefer not to sell valuable items outright
Individuals with poor credit history who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans or bank financing
People in LA County seeking convenient local access to collateral-based lending
diagnosis: Dave Tipp Jewelry & Loan is best for customers who own jewelry or gold and need immediate cash without credit approval, though borrowers should understand that unpaid loans result in permanent loss of collateral after California's 120-day redemption period. The main caveat is that specific loan terms and interest rates are not publicly disclosed online, requiring customers to visit in person or call for pricing before committing to a loan.
services: Collateral-based loans secured by gold and precious metals
Secondary sales of unredeemed collateral via eBay
In-person customer service at physical locations
